action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 crashed during training at epoch 1 due to json.dumps failing on a numpy float32 val_ic scalar. The model trained successfully for epoch 1 (val_ic=0.0328) but could not log metrics. Analysis: This is a serialization bug. Python's json module doesn't handle numpy scalar types. Decision: Fix train.py by casting all metric values to native Python float before writing to metrics.jsonl. Keep model.py unchanged. Rerun 3-epoch training, test predict.py locally, and submit evaluation to establish baseline score and measure end-to-end time.
